title: Name Record
description: Temporal name binding for an entity in the ontologia naming system. Each record represents a display name with a validity window; an entity can have multiple active names (aliases) but exactly one primary.

entity_id.description: UID of the entity this name belongs to

slug.description: URL-safe version of the display name (double-hyphens are semantic separators)

valid_from.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this name became active

valid_to.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this name was retired (null if still active)

is_primary.description: Whether this is the primary display name for the entity

source.description: What created this name record (user, agent, bootstrap, or system component)
